name: User profile & identity settings
description: Implement user profile read and update. Backend: GET /api/v1/users/me (return display name, email, created_at) and PATCH /api/v1/users/me (update display name; validates non-empty, max 100 chars). Frontend: Profile Settings page with display-name form, optimistic UI update, and inline error handling. Does NOT include avatar upload, identity-provider linking, or household membership display (those are Phase 2 per docs/product-specs/profile-management.md).
